frosted.name: Frosted
frosted.tagline: Glass sectors, color on the rim

style.openTitle: Open the picker and launch the selected browser/profile
style.hint: Opens the real picker window with your installed browsers and saved profile order. Selection opens the test URL.

profileOrder.noBrowsers: No browsers detected yet. Install a Chromium-family browser to customize profile order.
profileOrder.hiddenBanner_one: {{count}} new profile detected in {{browsers}}. They stay hidden from the Halo wheel until you add them.
profileOrder.hiddenBanner_other: {{count}} new profiles detected in {{browsers}}. They stay hidden from the Halo wheel until you add them.
profileOrder.hiddenTitle_one: {{count}} detected profile not yet placed in the Halo wheel
profileOrder.hiddenTitle_other: {{count}} detected profiles not yet placed in the Halo wheel
profileOrder.configureTitle: Configure this browser in the Halo wheel
profileOrder.unavailableTitle: Profile order is available only when a browser has more than one profile
profileOrder.noneConfigurable: Profile order can be configured after at least one detected browser exposes more than one profile.
profileOrder.keepOne: Keep at least one profile visible for Halo configuration.
profileOrder.mustRemain: At least one profile must remain visible
profileOrder.haloEmpty: Use the add sector to choose a visible profile.
profileOrder.clearNote: Saving now clears custom order and uses the browser default.
